title: Nvidium are Amazing!
description: This modpack is inspired by classic mod nvidium — smooth, optimized, and built for playing with friends without heavy shaders. It focuses on performance, interaction, and a clean visual experience while keeping everything fast and stable.
body:
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ️![Fps Are Amazing!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae6bf2d8b83bc28035e9c7fb62792df0331844d0.png)
## 🧩 Description
This modpack is designed to deliver a smooth, optimized, and social multiplayer experience. It enhances Minecraft’s core gameplay with performance improvements, visual refinements, and quality-of-life features — all while keeping the original feel of the game intact.

### ⚙️ Core Features

**Performance & Optimization: **Powered by Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Krypton, and CCME for faster world loading, higher frame rates, and reduced stutter.

**Enhanced Multiplayer: **Simple Voice Chat, Chat Heads, and What Are They Up To (WATUT) make communication and player interaction seamless and engaging.

**Building & Utility Tools:** Litematica, Inventory Profiles Next, Zoomify, and Shulker Box Tooltip provide advanced tools for builders and explorers alike.

**World & Visual Improvements:** Distant Horizons, Falling Leaves, Drip Sounds, Entity Texture Features, and Enhanced Block Entities create a more immersive world without compromising performance.

**Server Stability:** ServerCore, spark, and Bobby ensure reliability and consistency in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments.

### 🧠 Design Philosophy
The goal of this modpack is balance — staying faithful to the vanilla experience while enhancing every technical and social aspect of the game. It’s ideal for players and servers that want a clean, high-performance setup built around collaboration and long-term stability.

### 📌 Technical Info

Loader: Fabric

Compatibility: Client & Server

Focus: Performance, stability, multiplayer, and refined gameplay
